description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black body accented by orange highlights and metallic components. The weapon is equipped with a fixed stock and a prominent pistol grip, providing ergonomic handling. A long, sharp bayonet is mounted beneath the barrel, giving the rifle a dual-purpose capability for both shooting and close-quarters combat. The receiver and magazine area are robust, with visible mechanical details and a detachable box magazine. The top of the rifle includes a set of iron sights for aiming, and the overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials. The surface finish is sleek and slightly glossy, suggesting a high-quality, durable build suitable for urban environments.
description: A modern black rifle with orange accents, a fixed stock, bayonet, and iron sights, featuring a detachable box magazine and sleek, durable construction.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, highlighting the bayonet tip and the narrow profile of the barrel and handguard.
description_view_1: A full side view reveals the fixed stock, pistol grip, detachable box magazine, bayonet, and iron sights, with orange highlights visible.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the stock end and the alignment of the receiver, with minimal detail on the barrel or bayonet.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the same features as view 1, with the bayonet and magazine clearly visible, and the orange accents standing out.
